c1.speaker: narrator
c1.line: Gino emerges from the celebration holding aloft the bunch — THE bunch, the celebratory one, grapes like small green lanterns.

c2.speaker: gino
c2.line: Gibbons! Today of ALL days! The good ones! For the hero of Lanternside — bellissimo, no tragedy, only grapes!

c3.speaker: narrator
c3.line: Gary takes ONE grape. Looks at it a long moment — a week, a year, a whole inheritance in one small green sphere.

choices.line: (Milo is front-row, where a protected source belongs.)
(Milo watches from his window. Grounded. The game just remembers.)

c4g.speaker: narrator
c4g.line: Gary looks up at a curtained window two streets over, where an 11-year-old is watching the ceremony he should have been front-row for. Gary pockets the grape. Some debts wait for the grounding to end.
